name: Leverage Shares -1x Alibaba ETC
summary: Leverage Shares -1x Alibaba ETC is an exchange-traded commodity designed to provide the inverse of the daily performance of Alibaba shares. It uses leverage to deliver the opposite return, meaning that if Alibaba's stock price increases, the value of this ETC will decrease, and vice versa. These products are designed for short-term hedging or speculative purposes.
